_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: The results indicated that the expression patterning of mCherry-labelled Cas9 and GFP-labelled endogenous Gfap was exactly co-localized in either brain or spinal cord
details: GFP-labelled endogenous Gfap expression co-localized exactly with mCherry-labelled Cas9 in brain and spinal cord at 60 hpf
